readings.Aries: Your energy is a resource, not a personality trait. Spend it deliberately today. Notice what hasn't changed, not just what has.
readings.Taurus: The tension you're feeling is between what you have and what you want. They are not mutually exclusive. One conversation today matters more than the rest combined.
readings.Gemini: You've told the story of yourself differently to different people. Which version is closest to true? The first instinct was right.
readings.Cancer: There is a place in your life that needs tending that you've been avoiding because it hurts. The window for this is shorter than it looks.
readings.Leo: Your relationships are better when you are being yourself rather than the best version of yourself. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Virgo: You are harder on yourself than on anyone you love. Apply the same standard in both directions. Something is about to become obvious.
readings.Libra: You are more decisive than you believe. The hesitation is a habit, not a limitation. Go back to the original intention — it's still the right one.
readings.Scorpio: The threshold you're standing on is a real threshold. Cross it or turn back. Both are valid. You already have what you need to take the next step.
readings.Sagittarius: Something you said in passing planted something in someone else. It's still growing. The first instinct was right.
readings.Capricorn: There is a relationship in your life that has been managed rather than inhabited. Try inhabiting it. Saying less will move this further than saying more.
readings.Aquarius: The collective matters to you more than most. Don't let that abstract away from the specific. Something you've been measuring incorrectly just corrected itself.
readings.Pisces: Your instinct for when something is wrong is almost never incorrect. Trust it today specifically. Notice what hasn't changed, not just what has.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: Intellectually, this is effortless. Emotionally, you're both still waiting for the other to go first.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: You accelerate each other. The direction you're heading is worth establishing before you reach full speed.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: Something about this combination feels irresistible to both of you. That irresistibility is worth examining.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: You make each other more — more energised, more expansive, occasionally more than either of you can contain.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
